name: Miniclaw Update
description: Nightly self-update system. Checks for new stable-tagged versions of miniclaw-os fork, all plugins, and core. Updates everything EXCEPT workspace/ and USER/ directories.

updateTime.description: Cron expression for scheduled update checks. Default: '0 3 * * *' (3 AM daily)

autoRollback.description: Automatically rollback if mc-smoke fails after update. Default: true

notifyOnUpdate.description: Log a notification when updates are applied. Default: true

smokeTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for mc-smoke verification. Default: 60000 (60s)

repos.description: Repositories to check for updates. Defaults to miniclaw-os and openclaw fork.
